title: Chinese brain interface startup Gestala raises $21M just two months after launch
summary: This is the largest early-stage funding in China’s brain computer interface industry.

title: AI ‘actor’ Tilly Norwood put out the worst song I’ve ever heard
summary: This song is an AI actor's rallying cry to other AI actors, urging them to keep going despite the naysayers who doubt their humanity. Literally no one can relate to this.

title: Nuro is testing its autonomous vehicle tech on Tokyo’s streets
summary: Nuro began testing its self-driving software on public roads in Tokyo, marking the first international expansion for the AV startup.

title: Google Play is adding new paid and PC games, game trials, community posts, and more
summary: The updates indicate that Google is focused on transforming Google Play into an enhanced gaming hub.

title: Ford’s new AI assistant will help fleet owners know if seatbelts are being used
summary: Ford Pro AI debuted at Work Truck Week in Indianapolis and is now available to all of its U.S.-based Pro telematics subscribers.
